cpuUtilization.description: Instance with less than 10% CPU utilization over 7 days is considered idle

networkIn.description: Instance with less than 1MB/day network input is considered idle

readOps.description: Volume with fewer than 100 read ops/day over 14 days is considered idle

writeOps.description: Volume with fewer than 100 write ops/day over 14 days is considered idle

connections.description: RDS instance with fewer than 5 connections/day is considered idle

cpuUtilization.description: RDS instance with less than 5% CPU utilization is considered idle

requestCount.description: Load balancer with fewer than 100 requests/day is considered idle

currConnections.description: Cache cluster with fewer than 5 connections is considered idle

attached.description: Unattached Elastic IP addresses incur hourly charges

bytesProcessed.description: NAT Gateway processing less than 1MB/day is considered idle

cpuUtilization.description: Instance consistently below 30% CPU should be downsized

memoryUtilization.description: Instance consistently below 30% memory should be downsized

cpuUtilization.description: RDS instance consistently below 25% CPU should be downsized

freeStorageSpace.description: RDS instance with 70%+ free storage is over-provisioned

consumedReadCapacity.description: DynamoDB table using less than 20% provisioned read capacity

consumedWriteCapacity.description: DynamoDB table using less than 20% provisioned write capacity

cpuUtilization.description: Cache cluster consistently below 20% CPU should be downsized

sizeUtilization.description: Volume with less than 20% space used is over-provisioned
